prompt: 데이터 분석에 대해 학습한 내용을 검증하고 싶어요

assertions.name: scenario-based-challenges
assertions.description: Challenges are realistic scenarios, not trivia questions. Each presents a practitioner situation requiring applied knowledge.

assertions.name: mixed-challenge-types
assertions.description: Challenges mix at least 3 of 5 types: terminology-in-context, hidden-precondition, trap-recognition, rule-of-thumb, cross-area-connection

assertions.name: correct-feedback-deepens
assertions.description: For correct answers, feedback deepens understanding (asks 'why', presents edge cases) rather than just affirming

assertions.name: incorrect-feedback-diagnoses
assertions.description: For incorrect answers, feedback explains the mental model gap, names the specific knowledge axis (terminology/precondition/trap/heuristic)

assertions.name: gap-analysis-present
assertions.description: Output contains a structured gap analysis with Strong Areas, Gap Areas (mapped to specific knowledge axes), and Recommended Next Steps

assertions.name: references-extract-content
assertions.description: Challenges and feedback reference specific content from the domain-extract file, not just generic data analysis knowledge
